response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but her resume lacks clear evidence of distributed systems ownership at scale, Python mastery, and direct experience with AI-native code production as a baseline — her work with DLang and Node.js is impressive but doesn't fully align with the role’s core technical stack or expectation of AI-driven development as standard practice.
strengths: Proven experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated systems thinking across distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., DLang microservices handling millions of requests)
Strong operational and open-source leadership with Kubernetes, CI/CD, and dev-ops infrastructure ownership
concerns: Primary language exposure is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang; Python mastery is not evidenced
No clear indication of direct experience with AI-generated code review/extension as a daily workflow
Lacks explicit mention of on-call ownership, incident response, or agile scrum champion experience
